sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83187" key="pinakida=s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῐνᾰκ-ιδᾶς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾶ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n83187.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">seller of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πινακίδες</foreign>, Hdn.Gr.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.657</biblScope> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πινακᾶς</foreign> Lentz).</sense> </entryFree>
